active_color.description: Color used for the current and already-sung lyric characters. Defaults to the interface text color.
active_color.label: Active lyric color

animation.description: How lyrics animate on line change.
animation.label: Animation

char_width.description: Approximate pixel width per character, used to fix the widget width and clip scrolling.
char_width.label: Character width (px)

cue_font_family.description: Installed font family used only for intro and interlude characters in custom-font mode.
cue_font_family.label: Intro/interlude font

cue_font_mode.description: Choose whether intro and interlude characters follow Noctalia's interface font or use another installed font.
cue_font_mode.label: Intro/interlude font mode

cue_text.description: Text or characters highlighted during intros and interludes.
cue_text.label: Intro/interlude characters

custom_json_field.description: Lyrics field in a JSON response, with dotted paths such as data.lyric. Leave empty for plain LRC.
custom_json_field.label: JSON lyrics field

custom_url.description: Supports {title}, {artist}, {album}, and {duration} placeholders. Text responses may contain LRC directly.
custom_url.label: Custom endpoint URL

gradient.description: Light up each character as the song progresses (karaoke style).
gradient.label: Per-character gradient

inactive_color.description: Color used for upcoming lyrics, paused playback, and secondary lines.
inactive_color.label: Inactive lyric color

lyrics_source.description: Choose a preset source, local-player lyrics, a custom endpoint, or external push protocol.
lyrics_source.label: Lyrics source

marquee_speed.description: Pixels per second for long-line scrolling.
marquee_speed.label: Marquee speed

max_chars.description: Visible width before a long lyric line scrolls (marquee).
max_chars.label: Max characters

max_lines.description: Maximum lyric lines to show at once.
max_lines.label: Max lines

player_allowlist.description: Only use matching MPRIS player names or instances. Supports * wildcards; leave empty to allow all players.
player_allowlist.label: Allowed players

player_blocklist.description: Ignore matching MPRIS player names or instances. Supports * wildcards and takes priority over the allowlist.
player_blocklist.label: Blocked players

scroll_mode.description: How lyrics scroll in the bar.
scroll_mode.label: Scroll mode

show_cover.description: Display the song's album art next to the lyrics.
show_cover.label: Show album cover
